particulars.description: Amongst others, the property known as or being 1 new balham road, balham, SW12 9PH registered at the land registry with title number SGL229312. For more details please refer to the instrument.

persons_entitled.name: National Westminster Bank PLC (As Security Agent)

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: 1 balham new road london t/no sgl 229312. by way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.
